items.description: Role metadata generated from Chef metadata.rb
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is marked complete. Skipped to avoid overwriting.

items.description: Main tasks entry point — includes all sub-task files
items.notes: Created tasks/main.yml with validate_credentials.yml as first include, followed by default.yml include.

items.description: Ansible role default variables — includes fastapi_db_password (vault-encrypted), app paths, git repo, port
items.notes: Created defaults/main.yml with all role variables including app dir, git repo, service settings, system packages, and DB settings referencing AAP credential variables.

items.description: Handlers for systemd daemon-reload and fastapi-tutorial service restart
items.notes: Created handlers/main.yml with Reload systemd daemon and Restart fastapi-tutorial handlers.
Created vars/main.yml with derived path variables for service unit, env file, and requirements file.

items.description: Convert default.rb recipe: install system packages (python3, pip, venv, git, postgresql, postgresql-contrib, libpq-dev), create app directory, clone git repo, create venv, pip install, enable/start postgresql, provision DB user and database, deploy .env and systemd unit, daemon-reload, enable/start fastapi-tutorial service
items.notes: Converted all Chef resources to Ansible tasks using ansible.builtin modules. Uses AAP credential variables (db_username, db_password, db_name, db_host, database_url) instead of hardcoded values.

items.description: Jinja2 template for /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service — [Unit], [Service], [Install] sections; ExecStart uvicorn on port 8000; notifies daemon-reload handler
items.notes: Converted inline Chef file content to Jinja2 template with variables for service user, app dir, venv dir, app module, bind host, and port.

items.description: Jinja2 template for /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env — PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL with vault_fastapi_db_password variable; mode 0600
items.notes: Converted inline Chef file content to Jinja2 template. Uses database_url from AAP credential variable instead of hardcoded value.

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (app dir, venv, .env, systemd unit paths)
items.notes: Generated converge.yml that recreates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/: app directory, venv/bin with python/pip/uvicorn stubs, requirements.txt, .env file (mode 0600) with PROJECT_NAME/API_VERSION/DATABASE_URL, and systemd unit file (mode 0644) with all directives.

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection, no docker/podman

Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: app dir, venv/bin/uvicorn, .env content (DATABASE_URL), systemd unit file content, port 8000 listening, postgresql service, fastapi-tutorial service active
items.notes: Generated verify.yml translating all pre-flight checks: stat+assert for app dir, venv dir, venv/bin executables, requirements.txt, .env (content + mode 0600), systemd unit file (content + mode 0644, all directives). Service, port, and HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest as they cannot run in the delegated EE container.

items.description: No-op instance create playbook for delegated driver
No-op instance destroy playbook for delegated driver
